description_long: This is an L-shaped office desk featuring a dark wood finish with a prominent grain pattern. The desk has a spacious main work surface and an attached side return, providing ample workspace for multiple tasks or equipment. On one side, there is a pedestal with three drawers, each equipped with a metallic handle, offering organized storage for office supplies or documents. The opposite side of the desk is supported by a solid panel leg, giving the structure stability and a modern appearance. The drawers are finished in a lighter color, contrasting with the darker wood of the desktop and sides. The overall design is functional and professional, suitable for a contemporary office environment.
description: A modern L-shaped desk with a dark wood finish, three light-colored drawers, and a spacious work surface. The design is functional and professional, ideal for office use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three light-colored drawers with metallic handles and the main work surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the solid panel leg supporting the return.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open space beneath the drawers and the continuous wood grain of the desktop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the drawers and the uninterrupted wood finish of the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the three drawers and handles, intended for access and interaction, while the solid panel leg supports the return on the opposite side.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or executive office desk
